title: neubeckia cristata
intro: Neubeckia cristata, also known as Coral bells, is a flowering plant species in the Saxifragaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neubeckia cristata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
